creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-06-19 21:50:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/files patch-firmwares-Makefile 
                                  pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Add new port multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod:
  
  FreeBSD driver for Siano-based USB DVB devices.
  
  This driver have been tested with the following devices :
  
    * Terratec Cinergy Piranha
    * Hauppauge WinTV MiniStick (HD)
  
  However, other Siano-based USB devices should work, just give a try
  (you may want to add new VIDs/PIDs to make your device detected) !
  
  WWW: http://contribs.martymac.org
  
  PR:             ports/143989
  Submitted by:   Ganael Laplanche <ganael.laplanche at martymac.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +124 -0    ports/multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/files/patch-firmwares-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod/pkg-plist (new)
